name: Natsume Sakasaki
description:
As the son of a renowned fortune-teller, Natsume takes on fortune telling as well as idol activities. He tends to utter mysterious words and behave enigmatically, but he is also diligent in his work. He conducts experiments in pursuit of making his ideals a reality. Natsume sings with an sweetly mischievous voice, with performances that are sharp and sophisticated.

Natsume is the leader of Switch at NEW DIMENSION. He is refining his craft to achieve successful life both as a fortune-teller and as an idol. He is searching for new ways to deliver original directions that have not been done before to have beside his fortune-telling.
creator: ZENity
